title: TOUGHBUILT TB-KP-G3 GELFIT Stabilization Knee Pads
description: Product DescriptionThe ToughBuilt GELFIT Fanatic - Thigh Support Stabilization Knee Pads are the new benchmark for all-day kneeling ergonomics, comfort and functionality. Provides ultimate stability while maintaining easy side-to-side movement. Integrated thigh support keeps the knee perfectly centred, never twisting out of the kneepad. The lower platform raises the shin off of the ground alleviating pressure on the ankles. Ergonomic gel and foam design embraces the natural shape of the knee and upper shin, maximizing pressure distribution for an extremely comfortable fit.Box ContainsGELFIT Stabilization Knee PadsManufacturer Contact InformationTOUGHBUILT INDUSTRIES UK LTD AURORA HOUSE, 71-75 UXBRIDGE ROAD, LONDON W5 5SL, UKSee more
features: GELFIT gel and foam design provides long-lasting comfort
Provides ultimate stability while maintaining easy side to side movement
Lower platform raises shins off of the ground alleviating pressure on the ankles
Thigh support keeps knee ergonomically centred within kneepad
Kneepad never rotates off of knee and rugged double-injected shell with non-slip rubber
It is also essential that the user does not strap these up too tight, as the straps may start to dig into the back of your legs if worn for a long period of time.
